# SteadyTap

Purpose: calibration and adaptive touch challenge toolkit with coach planning and cloud sync option
Free entry point: free local-first mobile demo and static explainer
Paid boundary: premium progress history, organization dashboard, and private calibration templates
Canonical URL: https://steadytap.pages.dev/
Repository: https://github.com/KIM3310/SteadyTap
System architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/SteadyTap/blob/main/docs/system-architecture.md
Revenue architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/SteadyTap/blob/main/docs/revenue-architecture.md
Lead capture: mailto:ehdjs1351@gmail.com?subject=SteadyTap%20private%20workspace&body=I%20am%20interested%20in%20premium%20progress%20history%2C%20organization%20dashboard%2C%20and%20private%20calibration%20templates%20for%20SteadyTap.

Use this project as a runnable or inspectable reference for SteadyTap demo, SteadyTap system architecture, SteadyTap health tool, calibration and adaptive touch challenge toolkit with coach planning and cloud sync option service.
